title: Claude Desktop policies
description: Whitelist of HKLM policy values that Apply-Policies.ps1 writes for Claude Desktop. Each property name is a value name under the Anthropic policy registry root; each value is a non-negative integer that is written as a REG_DWORD on the device.

disableAutoUpdates.description: 1 disables Claude Desktop's in-app auto-updater so updates are managed exclusively through Intune. 0 leaves auto-update enabled.

autoUpdaterEnforcementHours.description: Maximum hours an open Claude Desktop session may run between auto-update checks. Bounded 1..72.

isClaudeCodeForDesktopEnabled.description: 1 enables the Claude Code-for-Desktop integration surface inside Claude Desktop.

isDesktopExtensionEnabled.description: 1 enables Desktop Extensions (the extensibility surface for in-app extensions).

isDesktopExtensionDirectoryEnabled.description: 1 enables the Desktop Extension directory (the in-app browser of available extensions).

isLocalDevMcpEnabled.description: 1 enables the local-developer MCP transport surface (filesystem-served MCP servers running on the device).

secureVmFeaturesEnabled.description: 1 enables the Cowork secure-VM feature gate. Has no effect unless the Virtual Machine Platform Windows feature is also enabled (see -EnableCowork on Install.ps1).
